# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# Config for Microservice 1 (Users Service)
microservice1:
  host: 'users-service:80'
  path: '/'

# Config for Microservice 2 (Posts Service)
microservice2:
  host: 'posts-service:80'
  path: '/'

services:
  - name: users-service
    routes:
      - name: users-service-route
        paths:
          - /users/*
        upstream_url: ${microservice1.host}${microservice1.path}
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true

  - name: posts-service
    routes:
      - name: posts-service-route
        paths:
          - /posts/*
        upstream_url: ${microservice2.host}${microservice2.path}
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true

routes:
  - name: users-api
    paths:
      - /users/*
    services:
      - users-service
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE

  - name: posts-api
    paths:
      - /posts/*
    services:
      - posts-service
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
